subject: english
text:
Choose the language function for the underlined sentence.
a.Ramu:Would you allow me to use your books?
Ravi  : Yes, of course.
A) instructionb. suggestion      c. order
D) asking permission
b.Mani: Hi, good morning, how are you?
Ramu: Hello, I am fine.
Mani: Could I use your phone, please?
Ramu: Sorry I need it now.
A.    Suggestion.          b. possibility          c. request        d. asking permission.

subject: english
text:
Read and choose the infinitive.
a.I like to drink Tea.
A) like to
B) like
C) to drink
D) tea
b.Ganesh: Ravi when is your birthday?
Ravi: it is on 13th February
Ganesh: How do you celebrate?
Ravi: I will celebrate by distributing sweets to the Parents, neighbours and friends.
Ganesh: I also like to do things like this.
Which one of the following is infinitive?
A) is                  b) will             c) celebrate              d) to do

subject: english
text:
Read the following and choose the correct ‘ If Clause’.
a.If I had got the money, I ________ bought the mobile.
a.will          b. would  c. would have
D) will have
b.Shreya: Hi, Krishna Why didn't you collect the parcel?
Krishna: I wasn't informed about it. If you had informed me earlier,  I…………collected it.
A) would have         b) would not have c) will have     d)   shall have
II Do as directed.
5 Fill in the blank with appropriate article
A) I saw ________ engineer.
B) Guru plays ……… Piano.
6 Fill in the blanks with correct preposition.
A) My book is ________ the bag.
B) Kumar is very weak ________Science. He cannot perform it well.
